room.name: Westminster Underground Station.
room.description: A small access tunnel leads southeast towards the Ministry of Peace. Faint echoes of footsteps filter down from another shaft above.

room.name: an access shaft between the Palace of Westminster and the Ministry of Peace.
room.description: A vertical shaft rises from the tunnel. A locked hatch above bears the insignia of the Ministry of Peace.

room.name: a Military Supply Bay
room.description: Stacks of damp wooden crates lie against the walls, stamped with faded insignia. One is half-open, revealing helmets and bayonets. The air smells of damp canvas.

room.name: a Drill Passage
room.description: A long, echoing passage lined with painted slogans: "WAR IS PEACE". The floor is worn smooth, as if countless boots once marched here in endless practice.
